title: Add dark mode toggle to header component
description: Add dark mode toggle to a header component. However, no header component currently exists in the codebase. The frontend layout (src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx) only contains a minimal structure with <main>{children}</main>. A fully implemented DarkModeToggle component already exists at src/components/dark-mode-toggle.tsx with comprehensive tests. This task requires clarification: (1) should a new header/navigation component be created that includes the dark mode toggle, and (2) where should the header appear (frontend-only pages or all pages)?
existing_patterns: src/components/dark-mode-toggle.tsx - Fully implemented DarkModeToggle component with localStorage persistence, system preference detection, and data-theme attribute application
src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx - Frontend layout that wraps children in main element
questions: Should a new header/navigation component be created, or does one already exist that I should locate?
Where should the header appear — only on frontend pages (app/(frontend)), or also on admin/dashboard pages?
What navigation links or branding should the header contain alongside the dark mode toggle?
